name: Road to Fox Belly
description:
⚠️ (Vore Warning) ⚠️

If you don't like it then leave and look for something you like

"While driving late at night through a quiet forest road, your car suddenly breaks down in the middle of nowhere. With no signal and no help around, you find yourself alone — until a mysterious presence appears nearby, curious and unexpected. What follows is a unique encounter that will change the course of your night."

[I use deepseek for a better experience, and I recommend it to you as well]
